items.title: Guinée : Sékouba Bambino, une voix entre tradition mandingue et scène mondiale
items.summary:
Figure incontournable de la musique guinéenne, Sékouba Bambino Diabaté incarne depuis plus de quatre décennies l’alliance entre tradition griotique et modernité. Révélé très jeune, passé par le mythique Bembeya Jazz National, il a su imposer une carrière solo remarquable tout en s’ouvrant à l’international avec Africando.

 Dans ce focus du Journal de l’Afrique, retour sur le parcours d’un artiste devenu passeur entre générations et symbole de l’évolution des musiques africaines.

translation.title: Guinea: Sekouba Bambino, a voice between Mandingue tradition and the world stage
translation.summary:
An essential figure in Guinean music, Sekouba Bambino Diabaté has for more than four decades embodied the alliance between griotic tradition and modernity. Revealed very young, spent by the mythical Bembeya Jazz National, he managed to impose a remarkable solo career while opening international with Africando.

In this focus of the Journal de l'Afrique, back on the path of an artist who became a passer between generations and symbol of the evolution of African music.

items.title: Hollywood boudé par Cannes... ou l'inverse?

On en parle avec notre invité Michel Bampély, chercheur en sociologie de l’art.

translation.title: Hollywood slammed by Cannes... or the other way around?
translation.summary: The official selection of the Cannes 2026 Festival was unveiled this week and no major American production is on the program. Only one American film has been selected for the competition: The Man I Love, by Ira Sachs. Would Cannes shove Hollywood Or would it be the other way around? We talk about it with our guest Michel Bampély, researcher in art sociology.

items.title: Bahareh Akrami : "dans les négociations, on parle d'Ormuz, mais pas de la population iranienne"

Un cessez-le-feu a finalement été annoncé, des négociations sont en cours. Mais elles n'évoquent pas le sort de la population iranienne, que Donald Trump avait pourtant appelé à se soulever contre le régime il y a quelques semaines. La dessinatrice franco-iranienne Bahareh Akrami était l'Invitée d'Au Coeur de l'Info.

translation.title: Bahareh Akrami: "In the negotiations we talk about Ormuz, but not about the Iranian population"
translation.summary: A distressing week for Iranian civilians as well as for the diaspora, after Donald Trump threatened "to destroy Iranian civilization". A ceasefire was finally announced, negotiations are under way. But they do not mention the fate of the Iranian population, which Donald Trump called on to speak out against the regime a few weeks ago. The Franco-Iranian cartoonist Bahareh Akrami was the Invitation of Au Coeur de l'Info.

items.title: Wild chimpanzees recorded waging ‘civil war’ with coordinated attacks between two groups

items.title: 全国人大常委会启动节约能源法执法检查
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 为推动节约能源法全面有效实施，促进更高水平、更高质量做好节能工作，全国人大常委会5日启动节约能源法执法检查。 节约能源法自1998年1月1日实施，并于2007年、2016年、2018年进行了修改。 记者5日从全国人大常委会节约能源法执法检查组第一次全体会议上了解到，为全面深入了解法律实施情况，此次执法检查采取实地检查与委托检查相结合的方式，检查组将赴天津、江苏、湖南、广东、广西、四川等省（区、市）开展实地检查，并委托北京、河北、山西、吉林、上海、重庆等省（市）人大常委会对本行政区域内节约能源法实施情况进行检查。检查组将采取实地检查、听取汇报、组织座谈、典型调研、专题研究、抽查暗访等多种方式，全面准确了解法律实施情况，对带有普遍性的问题深入调查研究。 检查组将重点检查8方面内容：落实节能管理制度情况，推进重点领域节能工作情况，重点用能单位节能管理情况，推动节能技术进步情况，实施节能激励措施情况，与法律配套的行政法规、部门规章以及地方性法规的制定情况，法律实施中存在的其他问题，对节约能源法修改的意见和建议。

translation.title: The Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress initiated an energy conservation law enforcement inspection
translation.summary: In order to promote the full and effective implementation of the Energy Conservation Act and to promote higher-quality and better-quality energy efficiency efforts, the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress launched an energy conservation law enforcement inspection on 5 June. The Energy Conservation Act has been in force since 1 January 1998 and was amended in 2007, 2016 and 2018. On 5 May, journalists learned from the first plenary meeting of the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress on Energy Conservation Law Enforcement Inspection Unit that, in order to gain a comprehensive and in-depth understanding of the implementation of the law, the inspection was carried out through a combination of on-site inspections and commissioned inspections, which were to be carried out in the provinces (districts and municipalities) of Tianjin, Jiangsu, Hunan, Guangdong, Guangxi and Sichuan, as well as by the Standing Committee of the People ' s Congress of Beijing, Hebei, Shanxi, Jilin, Shanghai and Chongqing. The Unit will have a comprehensive and accurate understanding of the implementation of the law and will conduct in-depth research and studies on issues of a universal nature, in a variety of ways, including on-site inspections, debriefings, organization of talks, typical research, thematic studies, spot checks and unannounced visits. The Unit will focus on eight areas: implementation of energy-saving management systems; promotion of energy-saving work in priority areas; focus on energy-saving management in energy-use units; promotion of technological progress in energy-saving activities; implementation of energy-saving incentives; development of administrative, sectoral and local regulations in conjunction with legislation; other issues in law enforcement; and suggestions and recommendations for amendments to energy-saving laws.
